  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Sahles no faldi fmirdamahm
Sahlem/ un leek to (fwehtu)
Maisi us to fchkiftu Galdu/ ir
tur irr tas felta Lukturis ar fa-
weem Efjes Luktueem/ kas ik
wakkaru tohp eededfinati/ jo
mehs turram ta KUNGA muh-
fa Deewa Wakti/ bet juhs effat
winnu atstahjuſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un nu redſi/ Deews irr ar
nuns paſcha Breekſch Galtâ/
un winna Preesteri ar fkanni-
gahm Trummetehtm prett jums
trummeteht.
Inhs Israëta
Behrui/ ne karrojeet ar to KUNG-
EU juhfu Tehwu Deewu/ jo tas
juhs ne buhs par labbu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Jerobeams likke Kar-
ra-Wihrus pakkat fleppeni tur-
retees/ ka tas no pakkatenes tecin
usbruktu/ ka tee tik labbi Anh-
da Breekſcha/ ka arri tee Glub-
netaji pakkat winneem buhtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu Juhda atpakkat
flattijahs/ rangi/ tad bija tas
Karſch teem us preeſchn un no
pakkalenes. Un tee peefauze to
KUNGU/ un tee Preesteri trum-
meteja ar Trummetehtm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ifkatrs no Juhda kle-
dse. Un kad tee Wihri no Juh-
da ta kleedse/ tad kawe Deews
Jerobeamu un winu Israëlu
preekſch Abiju un Juhdu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Israëta Behrni
behdſe preekſch Juhda/ un Deews
dewe tohs winnu Rohka.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Abijus ar taweem
Landim kawe tohs ar feelu Rau-
fchanu/ un no Israëta kritte no-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tä tappe tee Israëka
Behrni tannî Laikâ pasemmoti/
bet tee Behrni Juhda tappe
warreni/ tapehz ka tee hij us to
KUNGU farvo Tehwo Deewu
patahwufchees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Abijus dsinnahs Je-
robeamam pakkat/ nn usnehme
no ta tohs Pilsfahtus/ Beteli
ar winnas peederrigahm Wee-
tahm/ un Jesanu ar winna pee-
derrigahm Weetahm/ un Getwo-
nn ar winna peederrigahm Wee-
tahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jerobeamam ne palik-
fe wairs Spehka Abijus Laikâ/
bet tas KUNGS mohzija to/
ka tas nomirre.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Abijus ftriprs
ftua/ apnehme wiꞥſch tfchetr-
padeſmits Seewas/ un dſemdi-
naja diwideſmits un diwi Deh-
lus/ un feſchpadeſmits Meitas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas wehl no Abijus
Leetahm atleek/ un winna Zelfti/
un winna Wahrdi/ tee irr raksti-
ti eeſch ta Praweeta Jodusa
Stahſteein.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Abijus aiswigge ar fa-
weem Tehweem/ un tee aprakke
to Dahwida Pilli/ un winna
Dehis Afhus tappe par fehnihu
winna Weetâ. Ta paſcha Laik-
kâ bija ta Gemme deſmits End-
dus ar Meeru.
"
    }
